labs.title: Session Stack Walkthrough
labs.description: Walk the VTAM -> TSO -> ISPF layers and learn where trust boundaries shift.

labs.title: Batch Execution Basics
labs.description: Submit a simple job and map the JCL -> JES -> program execution chain.

labs.title: RACF Authorization Model
labs.description: Understand how RACF enforces access control on datasets, programs, and resources.

labs.title: Dataset Enumeration
labs.description: Discover and catalog datasets to map the system's data landscape.

labs.title: TSO User Enumeration
labs.description: Discover valid TSO userids through logon response analysis.

labs.title: JCL Security Analysis
labs.description: Analyze JCL for security implications and privilege escalation paths.

labs.title: Hidden Field Detection
labs.description: Identify non-display fields that may contain sensitive data or bypass controls.

labs.title: SDSF Job Inspection
labs.description: Use SDSF to examine running jobs, output, and system activity.

labs.title: CICS Transaction Enumeration
labs.description: Discover valid CICS transactions and understand the transaction security model.

labs.title: MVS IPL & System Operations
labs.description: IPL the MVS system, start VTAM/TSO, submit jobs, manage JES2 queues, display system status, and perform a clean shutdown. Every command documented with mental models.

labs.title: COBOL Compile & Run on MVS
labs.description: Create a COBOL program using RPF, write JCL, submit the job, and view output. Every command and JCL parameter documented with mental models.

labs.title: MVS 3.8j Command Reference
labs.description: Comprehensive reference for Hercules, MVS operator, JES2, TSO, RPF, and JCL commands — with mental models explaining what each command does and why.
